occurrence_sentence: This demonstration on Ankaa-2 showed decoding times under one microsecond, a critical threshold for hybrid quantum-classical operations and a major step toward fault-tolerant quantum computing. This method is being applied to the Novera and upcoming Ankaa-3 systems. Rigetti's client base includes 14 enterprise users and over 100 organizations, government partners, and academic institutions.
